instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a landing page for 'AI Copilot for SYSPRO ERP', a SaaS application targeted at non-technical ERP users. The user explicitly requested a 'white blue color scheme like repnet.vercel.app'. Use a clean, Swiss brutalist aesthetic, utilizing ample whitespace, crisp grid borders, electric blue accents, and high-fidelity typography. Avoid generic SaaS defaults; aim for a high-end, authoritative, enterprise vibe. DO NOT USE PLACEHOLDER IMAGES. Use only the provided `media_assets`.

surfaces_and_visual_enhancers.header: Crystal Glass: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50 transition-all
surfaces_and_visual_enhancers.card_default: Grid Borders: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,85,255,0.06)] hover:border-blue-500/30 transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_visual_enhancers.pro_pricing_card: Tracing Beam: Add a 1px solid primary color border with a subtle outer glow (drop-shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(0,85,255,0.2)]) to signify premium tier.

components.button_primary: bg-[#0055FF] text-white hover:bg-[#0044CC] px-6 py-3 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:outline-none
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-slate-700 hover:text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 px-6 py-3 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

shadcn_components_to_use: Card (use sparingly, prefer raw divs with `card_default` styles for bento grids)

sections_breakdown.design_instructions: Central massive H1, crisp subtitle. High-impact demo preview. Behind the hero text or adjacent, use the `hero_ai_dashboard` image as a visually stunning background/overlay, heavily masked or faded into pure white at the edges (e.g., bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent to-white). Use crystal glass for the floating nav above it.

Horizontal marquee of the partner logos representing target ERPs (SYSPRO, Acumatica, Sage, Epicor). Greyscale them using CSS filters to maintain the Swiss aesthetic (`grayscale opacity-60 hover:grayscale-0 hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-500`).

Grid MODE B (Control Room). Dense, crisp. 4 main features: NL to SQL (col-span-1 md:col-span-2), Chart Gen (col-span-1), Dashboard Builder (col-span-1 md:col-span-2), Anomaly Detection (col-span-1). Use lucide-react icons in duotone/blue tint. Each bento card should have a 1px border, white background, relying on `card_default`.

A technical 'deep dive' section showcasing how the AI connects to ERP. Two-column layout: left text (Swiss layout, heavily aligned), right image (`architecture_diagram`) with a 1px border and subtle shadow.
Use Shadcn Tabs. Left sidebar for doc topics, right pane for code/API examples using strict mono font (JetBrains Mono or standard ui-monospace). Highlight the 'AI agent' setup with crisp borders.
3 columns. Starter, Pro, Enterprise. Distinct hierarchy. Flat backgrounds, primary CTA in Pro tier, secondary in others. Pro tier must use the `pro_pricing_card` style.
Centered, narrow column to maintain readability. Input fields customized with `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500` and `border-slate-200`. Clean, zero friction. Use a minimal form.

hero_background.description: Abstract AI dashboard visualization for hero section. Apply linear mask to blend with white background.

architecture_diagram.description: Architecture blueprint to be shown in the Project Thinking section.

technical_rules.motion: Use framer-motion for bento staggered reveal and smooth entrances.
technical_rules.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based.
technical_rules.accessibility: Ensure text colors meet APCA over white. Use focus-visible for rings.
